nasb.text: ‘By these, moreover, you will be made unclean: whoever touches their carcasses becomes unclean until evening,

esv.text: “And by these you shall become unclean. Whoever touches their carcass shall be unclean until the evening,

cnv.text: “以下事物，會使你們成為不潔：觸摸動物屍體的，就不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: “以下的动物会使你们不洁净。任何人接触到它们的尸体，都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
